title: lowvol63 ISOLATED: isolated 5-gate test of the lowvol63 factor hidden inside the EDGE-2 composite (1st isolated lowvol63 measurement, N<=3 per factor)
decision_owner: the project. Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; does NOT finalize deployment. Even a GERCEK-EDGE headline is at most an overlay CANDIDATE -- a separate the project decision. Deployment is NEVER auto-triggered.
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any NRR-007 result is computed and BEFORE any result is seen. The engine (src/screening/nrr007_lowvol63.py) REFUSES to run unless this file exists. The lowvol63 definition (D-203-IDENTICAL), the 5-gate adaptation (gates 1-4 cost-free D-203, gate-5 realistic Roll+Kyle D-204), and the combined verdict are FROZEN here and will NOT be relaxed post-hoc (no window/lookback widening, no factor redefinition, no lambda_kyle re-calibration, no breakeven cherry-picking, no new threshold). N=1 candidate (lowvol63 ISOLATED). MEASUREMENT-ONLY; optimization FORBIDDEN. The lowvol63 signal is D-203/EDGE-2-IDENTICAL (the engine function lowvol_panel is CALLED, the committed engine is NOT modified). Gates 1-4 run via run_gates_on_score, a BIREBIR copy of eng.run_gates whose ONLY difference is the INJECTED score panel; a MATCH=True test asserts the replica reproduces eng.run_gates exactly on hi52 (zero-touch fidelity). REUSES the D-203 frozen panel verbatim (same content hashes) + the D-204 cost/stat geometry verbatim.
motivation: hi52 CLOSED (D-205, N<=3 final: real signal but not retail-tradeable even liquid-first). Decision (the project): measure the remaining cross-sectional Yol-1 candidates ONE BY ONE. lowvol63 was a component of the D-203 EDGE-2 composite (mom120 + hi52 + lowvol63, equal-weight rank-avg) but was NEVER tested in ISOLATION (the D-203 engine only dispatched value/edge2/hi52). The hi52 lesson: a bundle can HIDE a distinct factor -> isolated test deserved. NRR-007 runs the IDENTICAL lowvol63 signal through the D-203 5-gate methodology with a realistic gate-5.
honest_expectation: demo-3 S1/H4 pre-measured lowvol63-isolated +0.56%/mo, t=0.94 (BELOW the Gate-2 t>=2 bar, insignificant) -> PROBABLY ELIMINATED. This is a DEFINITIVE-CLOSURE run; NO celebration expected. It is cheap (engine ready, one run). BUT the demo-3 pre-indicator was pre-cost + full-universe; the isolated full test (5 gates + realistic cost) MAY differ -> it still deserves the run (hi52 lesson: pre-indicator != full test). Whatever the result, report it honestly. Elimination is a clean, valuable result.
does_NOT_change: NRR-007 does NOT redefine lowvol63 (D-203/EDGE-2-IDENTICAL), does NOT modify the committed D-203 engine (gates via injected-score replica, MATCH=True verified), does NOT touch D203_CANDIDATES. It is a measurement of an existing factor in isolation.
basis: D-203 results docs/yol1/d203_results.json + STAGE0_d203.json (lowvol63 = EDGE-2 component; lowvol_panel defined at d203_clean_universe_test.py:219-231)
D-205 results docs/yol1/d205_results.json + D-205-rapor.md (hi52 CLOSED N<=3 final -> proceed to remaining candidates one by one)
demo-3 S1/H4 lowvol63-isolated pre-indicator (+0.56%/mo, t=0.94, pre-cost + full-universe -> below Gate-2 bar)
D-204 docs/research/D-204-rapor.md + d204_hi52_stress.py (realistic Roll+Kyle cost harness, reused verbatim for gate-5)
hypothesis: On the D-203 frozen clean universe, the ISOLATED lowvol63 top-15 EW tilt produces a positive EW_FULL-relative net edge that survives the 5 gates (selection-null + NW|t|>=2 cost-free + cross-regime 2022-01 + liquidity-tercile + realistic after-cost) AND a realistic after-cost EW_FULL-relative mean > 0 with breakeven >= 2x realized realistic cost. NULL/expectation alternative: the cost-free edge is insignificant (Gate-2 FAIL, consistent with demo-3 t=0.94) OR realistic cost zeroes it -> lowvol63 is ELIMINATED / GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL.
what_this_is_NOT: NOT an optimization (lowvol window 63 FROZEN D-203-identical; lambda_kyle FROZEN; no threshold pick). NOT a redefinition of lowvol63 (D-203/EDGE-2-IDENTICAL signal). NOT a modification of the committed engine (injected-score replica, MATCH=True). NOT a re-measurement of the data (reuses the D-203 frozen panel + content hashes verbatim). NOT a true regime-change OOS -- the walk-forward is honest IN-SAMPLE, the 2024-26 disinflation window is a WEAK proxy; the OOS gap is stated in every non-SERAP verdict. NOT a 4th-round of a closed factor (lowvol63 is its 1st isolated measurement; N<=3 lock per factor).

candidate_N_lock.rule: N=1 (lowvol63 ISOLATED). NRR-007 is the 1st isolated lowvol63 measurement (N<=3 lock per factor).
candidate_N_lock.candidate: lowvol63-isolated (inverted trailing-63d realized-vol, low-vol = high score).

lowvol63.def: score = -std of trailing-63d clipped daily returns (low vol = high score); D-203/EDGE-2-IDENTICAL (eng.lowvol_panel)

factor_geometry_FROZEN_REUSE.selection: select_top_n on _xs_rank(lowvol_panel(daily, rebal)); injected as the score panel into the run_gates replica (no new ranking, no engine edit).

benchmark_FROZEN.primary: EW_FULL = equal-weight of the entire clean universe per period (the D-203 standard honest bar -- does lowvol63-top-15 beat just holding all names EW?).

windows_REUSE.note: Reused verbatim from D-203/D-204/D-205. Monthly cadence (D-203/204-comparable). lowvol63 is price-only; the common window is used as PRIMARY for D-204/D-205 comparability.

five_gates_FROZEN.gate1_selection_null: Cost-free REAL top-15 vs a fair null drawing random-15 from the SAME full pool each period (eng.fair_selection_null); PASS if the strategy real-mean beats the >=95th percentile of the null (D203_GATE_NULL_PCTILE). D-203-IDENTICAL.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate2_newey_west_costfree: NW |t| (lags=3) of the COST-FREE EW_FULL-relative series >= 2.0 (D203_GATE_NW_T_MIN). D-203-IDENTICAL. THIS IS THE KEY GATE per the demo-3 t=0.94 expectation.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate3_cross_regime_costfree: regime_split at 2022-01-01 on the cost-free EW_FULL-relative series -> both sub-periods relative-positive. D-203-IDENTICAL.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate4_liquidity_costfree: within the LIQUID value_tl tercile, the cost-free EW_FULL-relative edge survives (>0); liquidity_collapse flagged if illiquid>0 but liquid not. D-203-IDENTICAL.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate5_after_cost_realistic: REALISTIC per-stock Roll(1984)+Kyle(1985) cost (D-204 per_stock_cost_panel / d204_basket_net_series, REUSED verbatim, lambda_kyle FROZEN). PASS if the after-cost EW_FULL-relative mean > 0. STRICTER than the D-203 flat gate-5 (the D-203 20/100bp flat legs are reported as CONTEXT only).

cost_geometry_FROZEN_REUSE_D204.model: Per-stock round-trip = 2*(Roll one-way spread + Kyle one-way impact) + commission(0). Roll (1984) close-only spread PRIMARY; RR-015 tier half-spread model-independent CROSS-CHECK. Identical to D-204 (src/screening/realistic_cost.py, PORTED).
cost_geometry_FROZEN_REUSE_D204.cost_note: lowvol is generally LOW turnover (unlike hi52 ~88%). Turnover + holding-period are REPORTED (d204.holding_period_stats); if turnover is low, cost bites less -> the cost-free signal (gate-2) is the real question. selected_picks roll round-trip + roll-zero reported (compare to D-204 microcap ~340bp / roll-zero %51.9).

statistics_FROZEN_REUSE.note: Reused verbatim from D-203/D-204 so the measurement matches the KESIN-TEST + STRES-TEST exactly.

verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.ELENDI: cost-free verdict (eng.d203_verdict) == SERAP (EW_FULL-relative <= 0 OR long-short < 0 OR liquidity_collapse OR a cost-free gate FAILS, incl. gate-2 NW|t|<2) -> lowvol63 ELIMINATED (expected; consistent with demo-3 t=0.94). Clean archive; no OOS-gap needed (signal not even real cost-free).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.GERCEK-EDGE: cost-free verdict GERCEK-EDGE or REJIM-TILT AND realistic after-cost EW_FULL-relative mean > 0 AND breakeven >= 2x realistic cost -> the first non-hi52 deployable Yol-1 cross-sectional CANDIDATE (overlay CANDIDATE; deploy is a separate the project decision, NOT auto-triggered). SURPRISE relative to the demo-3 pre-indicator.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL: cost-free verdict GERCEK-EDGE or REJIM-TILT BUT realistic after-cost mean <= 0 OR breakeven < 2x realistic cost -> signal real but not retail-tradeable; clean archive, consistent with the hi52 pattern.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.oos_gap_MANDATORY: Every NON-SERAP verdict attaches the explicit OOS-gap statement: the 2019-26 sample is one long high-inflation regime; a true inflation-normalization OOS is ABSENT; the walk-forward is in-sample and the 2024-26 disinflation window is only a weak proxy. Regime-change robustness is NOT proven. Deployment is a separate the project decision.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.no_post_hoc_relaxation: the lowvol window, the gate thresholds, the 2x safety multiple are frozen here; not loosened after seeing results. lowvol63 N<=3 lock per factor.

thresholds_reference.decision_constants: REUSED from src/signals/thresholds.py via d203_config/d204_config (D203_GATE_NW_T_MIN=2.0, D203_GATE_NULL_PCTILE=0.95, D203_GATE_COST_LOW/HIGH_BPS, D204_LAMBDA_KYLE, D204_BREAKEVEN_SAFETY_MULT). NO new NRR-007 threshold (the lowvol window + gate thresholds + cost constants already exist).
thresholds_reference.measurement_geometry: src/screening/nrr007_config.py (reuses snapshots/windows/lowvol-geometry from d203_config + cost/walk-forward/regime geometry from d204_config verbatim).
thresholds_reference.cost_mechanics: src/screening/realistic_cost.py (Roll/Kyle/tier; PORTED from ballast), via d204_hi52_stress.py.

fundamentals.source: D-203 FAZ-0 (reused; not needed for lowvol63 but panel-consistent)

outputs: docs/yol1/nrr007_results.json (after run: cost 3-numbers Roll/tier/breakeven + EW_FULL-relative cost-free + realistic + 5 gates + turnover/holding + walk-forward + cost-free 3-way verdict + combined headline)

docs/research/NRR-007-rapor.md (verdict ELENDI / GERCEK-EDGE / GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL; turnover lowvol-low-or-not; cost 3-numbers; OOS-gap explicit; demo-3 t=0.94 comparison) + docs/RESEARCH_REGISTRY.md line
